name: Minted Peas
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Shelled fresh peas (or Thawed frozen petite peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the clarified butter in a medium-sized pan over low heat until melted.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped mint, steeping for about 15 minutes while keeping warm.
3. Place the peas in the top half of a steamer basket and cover with scallions and whole mint leaves.
4. Steam over rapidly boiling water for 4 minutes or until peas are just tender. Discard the whole mint leaves.
5. Remove from heat, toss the peas with the mint butter, add salt and pepper to taste, and serve immediately.
This recipe serves 6.
